label: Kick it open (STR 4)
result_text: The lid gives. Inside: a dagger.

label: Leave it.
result_text: Not worth the trouble.

label: Ask for treatment.
result_text: They work quickly and without complaint.

label: Leave them to it.
result_text: You nod and keep moving.

label: Ask about local routes.
result_text: The merchant shares routes that ease your journey.

label: Move on.
result_text: You continue down the road.

label: Decipher the old script beneath it (Scholar).
result_text: Beneath the warning, an older inscription marks a hidden cache. You find a charm tucked in the signpost's base.

label: Read the warning.
result_text: Road patrols are moving north. You adjust your route accordingly.

label: Press on.
result_text: Whatever it says, it's not your concern.

label: Leave an offering (WIL 3).
result_text: You set something at the base. The party feels a little steadier afterward.

label: Take the coin at its base.
result_text: You pocket the copper. Someone else's luck, now yours.

label: Walk past.
result_text: The flowers bow in the wind as you pass.

label: Lower someone down on a rope (DEX 3).
result_text: Your nimble climber descends and retrieves a ring, left by someone who went down and didn't come up.

label: Drop a stone in.
result_text: It hits stone a long way down. The echo takes longer than it should.

label: Move on.
result_text: Whatever's down there can stay there.

label: Search the pack.
result_text: Tucked under a spare shirt: a healing potion. Whoever left it, left in a hurry.

label: Stay the night and wait.
result_text: Nothing friendly shows up. In the scramble to leave before dawn one of your party takes a bad knock.

label: Leave it alone.
result_text: Not your fire, not your pack.

label: Take it with you.
result_text: The little beast trots after you, surprisingly determined.

label: Leave it be.
result_text: It follows a while longer, then cuts into the scrub and vanishes.

label: Cite your service and walk through (Soldier).
result_text: They stand aside without a word. You keep walking.

label: Offer a potion as road tax (Healing Potion).
result_text: They accept it without comment and wave you through.

label: Walk through without stopping.
result_text: Words are exchanged. Hands are laid on. You pass, but not without cost.

label: Take the long way around.
result_text: You give them a wide berth through open ground. You feel exposed the whole way.

label: Lift something on the way through (Rogue).
result_text: No one notices until you're well away.

label: Try to recruit one of them.
result_text: One of them eyes your group. There's interest there. Nothing comes of it yet.

label: Keep walking.
result_text: They don't follow. You don't look back.

label: Approach and tend to the child (WIL 3).
result_text: She's frightened but unhurt. Before she runs she presses a small charm into your hand.

label: Search the ruin for anything useful (Soldier).
result_text: A scorched but wearable leather vest hangs on a peg inside the collapsed door.

label: Ask her what happened.
result_text: She says soldiers in black cloaks did it. Then she runs.

label: Move on.
result_text: You leave her to whatever comes next.

label: Touch it and concentrate (COG 4).
result_text: Something old and alert takes notice. A clarity settles in.

label: Read the inscription on the base (Dwarf).
result_text: Old quarry marks. A boundary stone. You know which side you don't want to sleep on.

label: Try to knock it over.
result_text: The stone won't move. Something in the ground does.

label: Leave it standing.
result_text: Some things are better left alone.

label: Find a ford upstream (DEX 3).
result_text: A quarter mile up, the water runs shallow. You cross cold but unharmed.

label: Wade straight across (VIT 3).
result_text: Cold and slow, but the footing holds. You make it.

label: Rope the crossing.
result_text: You manage it, but the current bruises someone's ribs.

label: Turn back.
result_text: You give up the crossing. Ground lost.

label: Say words over the dead (Scholar).
result_text: The right words steady you, even here.

label: Disturb the soil.
result_text: You find a blade half-buried in the turned earth. Someone pays for the digging.

label: Leave quickly.
result_text: You double your pace and don't look back.

label: Approach and sketch it (Gnome).
result_text: You sketch it quickly. The proportions match no known god-form. That's useful.

label: Look directly at it.
result_text: It looks back. A pressure behind your eyes lingers for days.

label: Back away slowly.
result_text: You don't turn your back until the clearing is out of sight.

label: Take her on.
result_text: Renn slings her quiver over one shoulder and falls into step behind you.

label: Not interested.
result_text: She shrugs and turns back toward the road.

label: Let it follow.
result_text: The skeleton rises and falls into step at the back of the group without a word.

label: Destroy it.
result_text: The bones resist more than they should. Your hand aches.

label: Leave it be.
result_text: It watches until you are out of sight.
